creator: blue.seahorse.syndicate@gmail.com
text:
I installed Xorg 7.5.2 and KDE4 4.8.4 when getting a new driver for my AMD 7950 video card from the STABLE list.  I notice that when I select Open GL for my rendering option under System Settings then Desktop Effects then Advance that my selection must be re-selected every time after reboot.  It defaults to Xrender.

How-To-Repeat: Just reboot
